mapper.select: SELECT sm.movement_id, sm.product_id, sm.warehouse_id, sm.movement_type, sm.qty, sm.unit_cost, sm.ref_order_id, sm.ref_order_type, sm.remarks, sm.created_by, DATE_FORMAT(sm.created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS created_at, p.product_code, p.product_name, p.unit, w.warehouse_code, w.warehouse_name, m.name AS created_by_name FROM STOCK_MOVEMENT sm INNER JOIN PRODUCT p ON sm.product_id = p.product_id INNER JOIN WAREHOUSE w ON sm.warehouse_id = w.warehouse_id INNER JOIN member m ON sm.created_by = m.member_id WHERE sm.movement_id = #{movementId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO STOCK_MOVEMENT (product_id, warehouse_id, movement_type, qty, unit_cost, ref_order_id, ref_order_type, remarks, created_by, created_at) VALUES (#{productId}, #{warehouseId}, #{movementType}, #{qty}, #{unitCost}, #{refOrderId}, #{refOrderType}, #{remarks}, #{createdBy}, NOW())
